Workset Manager Set Workset Visibility Default

writes to model Public API · not yet exposed

Set IsVisibleByDefault for a workset.

What you'll see in the chat

on start
Running workset manager set workset visibility default…
on success
workset manager set workset visibility default: done.
on failure
workset manager set workset visibility default failed: {error}

Not yet exposed
